items.name_en: M12088 Large Bella Bucket Bag from the Flight Mode collection. This piece features classic perforated leather rendered with a seasonal gradient effect, while the lining continues the fresh tones of the body. A removable coin pouch ensures tidy storage, making it a modern choice that transcends the winter season.
items.name_cn:
M12088 Large Bella Bucket Bag from the Flight Mode collection. This piece features classic perforated leather rendered with a seasonal gradient effect, while the lining continues the fresh tones of the body. A removable coin pouch ensures tidy storage, making it a modern choice that transcends the winter season.
30 x 28 x 16 cm
(H x W x D)
Perforated calfskin leather
Calfskin trim
Microfiber lining
Metal hardware
Round coin pouch
Metal studs on base
Fits short wallet, smartphone, keys, and earphones
Strap: Removable, adjustable
Drop: 50.0 cm
Drop extends to: 56.0 cm
Handle: Single handle, removable

items.name_en: M13094 Monogram Cherry Blossom. This Speedy Bandouliere handbag features classic Monogram coated canvas, illuminated by the sweet cherry blossom pattern from the Takashi Murakami Reproduction series. Crafted with refined leather, it includes a Toron top handle, a detachable shoulder strap, and a Murakami key pouch. The compact size easily accommodates daily essentials like a phone and long wallet. Dimensions: 20.5*12*13cm.

items.name_en: M13679 Blue Denim Cherry Blossom 🍒. This Venice backpack is from the Takashi Murakami Reproduction series, incorporating personalized cherry embroidery into the Monogram denim canvas, vividly interpreting the artist's colorful whimsy. Refined leather outlines the slender straps, and bright buckles accent the flap and exterior pocket. Dimensions: 24*7*26cm. (Excludes doll)

items.name_en: M13988 Black Top-tier replica, changed code chip 163c
items.name_cn:
M13988 Black Top-tier replica, changed code chip 163c
This Keepall Cargo Bandoulière 25 bag is crafted from shiny calfskin, conveying Pharrell Williams' dandy aesthetic through an elegant, understated urban design. The Louis Vuitton Paris patch is cleverly fixed to the bag body with beaded rivets, and the main compartment zipper pull is embellished with LV lettering. 15 x 11 x 25 cm (H x W x D)

items.name_en: M13994 Blue Denim Cherry Blossom 🍒. The Pochette Accessoires handbag joins the Takashi Murakami Reproduction series. Dimensions: 22*4*13cm. (Excludes doll)

items.name_en: M14098 Black Color Full Steel Hardware! Chip Version, Phone Pouch Métis! The unique reproduction series Phone Pouch Métis is crafted in colored Monogram coated canvas, injecting vitality into this daily essential. The bag's flap design is specifically for storing smartphones and keys, paired with silver riveted corner guards and S-lock closure, paying tribute to the brand's iconic hard suitcase elements. The bag comes with a detachable chain strap for multiple carrying options.

items.name_en: M14194 Black & Color
items.name_cn:
M14194 Black & Color
The 2025 Takashi Murakami collaboration Nano Diane is a mini version of the Diane bag. This bag features natural leather trim, showcasing a unique round flap and a belt-style magnetic closure design, suitable for carrying essentials like a phone. It also comes with a detachable handle and a detachable shoulder strap of adjustable length, allowing for various carrying styles.
19 x 10.5 x 6 cm
(Length x Height x Width)

items.name_en: M14231 White Flower Cherry Blossom 🍒 (M46279). This Pochette Metis East West handbag is from the Takashi Murakami Reproduction series, dyeing the Monogram coated canvas in soft new-season tones that complement the artist's sweet cherry pattern. A glossy S-lock buckle brightens the overall design, and the compact structure features multiple compartments, making it an elegant choice for daily travel. Dimensions: 21.5*6*13.5cm. (Excludes doll)

items.name_en: M14239 White Cherry Blossom 🍒(M81911) This Wallet On Chain lvy bag continues the 2000s personality narrative, joyfully joining the x Takashi Murakami replica series. Monogram canvas subtly highlights the vivid colors of the cherry pattern, fully releasing the kawaii power in the mind of this Japanese artist. Leather shoulder strap and chain for shoulder carrying. Dimensions: 23.5*4.3*12cm. (Excludes doll)
